creator: shyam_kumpati@yahoo.com
text:
Hi,

I installed FreeBSD 6.3 without any problems.

When I try to install from ports: www/apache22, devel/subversion, www/mod_python3 and www/trac , it is failing with the error as below.

*****************************************************************************
===>  Found saved configuration for apache-2.2.6_2
=> httpd-2.2.6.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/apache22.

=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/apache22 and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/apache22.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/apache22.

*****************************************************************************

I am trying to execute the following commands:

# export HTTP_PROXY=http://<my domain>\<my id>:<my domain password>@<ip addr of proxy serber>:<proxy server port no>
# cd /usr/ports/www/apache22
# make HTTP_PROXY=$HTTP_PROXY install WITH_BERKELEYDB=db42
# cd /usr/ports/devel/subversion
# make HTTP_PROXY=$HTTP_PROXY install -DWITH_MOD_DAV_SVN
# cd /usr/ports/www/mod_python3
# make HTTP_PROXY=$HTTP_PROXY install
# cd /usr/ports/www/trac
# make HTTP_PROXY=$HTTP_PROXY install

I am completely new to FreeBSD. So, please help me in getting around with this problem.

Thanks,
Shyam
